TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Li-se-pen, title = Li-se-pen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Li-se-pen} }

S.FORM: == Li-se-pen ÈáåÊñØÊú¨ == Li-se-pen " kamu nu Pu-taw-ya "Lisboa(li í'bo…ê) , u Pu-cin, Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo a suotu atu satabakiay nu tukay, u tatelungan nu cen-ce a kanatal, malasihu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatal a lumaan. kakitidaan itida i Pu-taw-ya teban timulan nu Ta-si-yeng dadipasan, tukay nu amis u Sin-te'-la buyu', timulan nu tukay u Te'-zu sa'wac nu tatahkalan, atu Lun-tun, Pa-li, Luo-ma sakalecad u Si-o satenesay nu likisian a tukayan. kitidaan nu macimacian 100.05 pin-fan-kun-li, tademaw 544,851 ku tademaw. pasu Wi-sin-cen a tukayan nu tademaw malakuuyt tu 300 wang nu tademawan, mahida u Pu-taw-ya tademaw a 27%. ayda atu Puo-e-tu masulecad u Pu-taw-ya nu tusaay a dayhiwan nu tukay. Li-se-pen u tukay atu ce-cya-se, u kakitidaan nu sihu atu luma' nu tapan a kanatal. Pu-taw-ya-yi kanatal kapulungan nu hunbu itida i niyadu' nuheni, u O-cuo-ta-lu satipan a suo-tu, itida i Ta-si-yen dadipasan. (CPLP) . Li-se-pen u ginku, papacakayan, pasingbungay, nalimaan, kanatal nu sasiwbayan, cyawyi atu laliwkuan a satapangan, sipakayda i kitakit atu kanatalan nu tukay nikinkiwan tu wanlu "GaWC" a nihapuan " kitakit nu tukay" a nganganan, sipasilac u ALPHA-ci a kanatal nu tukay, u O-cuo-ta-lu a angangan nu tatelungan a sakaudip, Li-se-pen-kan u O-cuo-ta-si-yeng dadipasan nu satabakiay a minatuan. Namahida, Li-se-pen pahikukian itida i tusepcaywal mihcaah miala tu tusiwsepsep nu taydaay a tademaw, u Pu-taw-ya sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukiay, Yi-pi-li-pan-daw sakatulu nu sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukian atu O-cuo tu saka tusep nu sainai'ay nu lawdan a pahikukiay. (GaWC) ALPHA- . Li-se-pen u Na-o saka siwa nu taydaay musakamuay a satabakiay nu tukayan, mikilul tu Yi-se-tan-paw, Luo-ma, Pa-say-lung-na, Mi-lan, Ya-tin, Wi-ni-se, Ma-te-li atu Fuo-luo-lun-se, tusepcaywal mihcaan, Li-se-pen nu taydaay midang a tademaw makaala tu 3,539,400 ku tademaw. kitidaan nu Li-se-pen a GDP picakayan mikitalakaw tu Pu-taw-ya duma nu niyadu'an. pulung nu sakasilaculan 963 yi menyen. pulung nu siwkac saka sepat a bataan. Pu-taw-ya miawasay a kusi a hunbu itida namin i Li-se-pen niyadu'an. GDP . Li-se-pen i kitakit u satenesay a tukayan, saka tusa nu sumamaday nu O-cuo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu aydaay nu O-cuo matabal tu pina a se-ci a nikaadihan. picidekan u U-se. Kay-sa ku panganganay " Felicitas julia" imi u " palipahak Kay-sa" kainaian tu nu Luo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka lima a seci lingatu, Li-se-pen a silacan Ze-e-man niyadu' ku mikuwanay, nikuda sa itida i walu a secian hiyan nu Muo-e tademaw midebung, caycaysippic mihcaan, A-fan-suo ise debungan kina tukay, namakayda i Li-se-pen hida satu u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan. "Felicitas Julia"(ÊÑèÁÇ∫" . likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ namaka sin-se-ci zitay malingatu, Li-se-pen a kitidaan idaw tuku Yi-pi-li tademaw tuda mueneng, satabalay a tayniay nu tademaw u Fei-ni-ci tademaw. yu tuseplim mihcaan u Luo-ma-kun-he-kuo ku mikuwanay, tayaay mikuwanay ci Kay-sa pacakaten nida kina kitidaan malase', pangangan han u "Felicitasjulia" imi u " kalipahak Kay-sa", nika makatukuh tu kunyen lima a seci kakilukilul sa debungan nu Man-cu. "Felicitas Julia" . . kunyen piccaycay mihcaan, namaka pea-fuy a Muo-e tademaw midebung i Yi-pi-li pantaw, midebung tu Li-se-pen. palutatengaan tu Tapangan u Yi-se-lan-cyaw a Muo-e tademaw itida i maci patideng tu yadahay nu Cin-cen-se, patideng tu yadahay nu lumaan atu baluhay a cabeng. pikuwanan nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, macakat tu ku sakaudip nu macimacian, mila itiniay u tapang nu minatuan, imahini, macian nu tademaw caay namin kalecad ku palutatengaan tu Tapang idaw ku kilisetu, Mu-se-lin atu Yiw-tay tademaw. ÂÖ¨ÂÖÉ711Âπ¥, . caycaysippic mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya kuowan ci A-fun mililid tu hitay mi'dis tu Muo-e- tademaw, u Li-se-pen mutiku aca tu kilisetu. caytulimnem mihcaan, Li-se-pen mula Pu-taw-ya a suo-tu, hida satu mapatideng mala O-cuo atu -Ti-cun-hay tapang nu tataydaan misiwbay a tukayan. i kitidaan katinengan, katuud ku paculilay tu nu bayu a balungaan pasu ci Wa-se-ke.D.Cya-ma-tu u Li-se-pen malingand katukuh i kitakit nu caayay kalecad nu tataydaan mitahaw, sisa, katukuh tu sabaw tu enem a seci sakacelakan ku Li-se-pen tayaw, yadahay nu kiman itawya namaka Pu-taw-ya a mabulaway nu tademw nu Pa-si katukuh i Li-se-pen, itini kasi'puca u kaysing ku masangaay, sisa u Li-se-pen mala O-cuo u tatelungan nu pacakayay. 1147Âπ¥, . caylimsepnem mihcaan sepat bulad sabaw siwa demiad, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu kawaw tu Yiw-tay tademaw a militabat, maala ku 4000 nu tademawan makaala tu palasepaten nu cacayay ku mapatayay nu Yiw-tay a tademawan. caylimlucay mihcaan cacay bulad tuenem demiad, idaw ku tabakiay nu ninel i Li-se-pen . caylimwalsep mihcaan Si-pan-ya Ha-pu-se-paw-wancaw mikuwan tu Pu-taw-ya wanwi miduduc malepacaw, u Si-pan-ya a hitay midebung tu Li-se-pen, Si-pan-ya kuowan ci Fuy-li-pu ese mikutay mala Pu-taw-ya a kuowan, misakaput u Si-pan-ya ti-kuo ku sikawaway a Kun-cu-lan-pan Yi-pi-li lenmun, ya lenmun sadikuday u Pu-taw-ya itida i caynemsipsep mihcaan misiteked sa mabulesak. 1506Âπ¥4Êúà19Êó•, . caypiclimlim mihcaan, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu ninelan i O-cuo makaala tu siw a ci nu pihacengay nu ninel, makatuduh atu cabiyasan nu bayu makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wang ku mapatayay a tademaw, picidekan i Li-se-pen idaw ku siwa a wangan nu tademaw a mapatay, u tukay atu minatu ku pihacengay, pasuLi-wi-la-kun atu singanganay nu tuudan, kiwkay, aadihan tu cudad a luma' u luma' tu, kanahatu nu caayay ka luyuh nu ninelan ku lumaa' sadikuday caay tu pakaput tu lamal a nipipesengan, hida satu ku Li-se-pen a caay tu lekal, Pu-taw-ya kanatal hida satu malingatu a nai' ku laheci. 1755Âπ¥, . nipatidengan tu nadikudan a Li-se-pen, misaahebal tu putah, dadan, u Kuo-wan atu Suo-sin miawda tu katuuday nu misangaay tu luma' atu matinengay mikulitay patideng tu tatelungan nu maci, nika hini pabaluhay mikiyaku tu tukay, patideng tu baluhay a Pan-pa-e-se nu sangaan hidan u wayway nu lala' a misanga tu talakaw apuyu nu silacan, u Luo-ke-ke atu Sin-ku-ten cuyi ku sapatumi', nika sadayumen, palacacay han nu hakuna, nipisangaan tu lumaan kacan pacukedan tu sakacaay ka talaw nu ninelan. . sabaw siwa tu lingatu, ci Na-puo'-lun yise palekal tu pantaw kalepacawan midis tu Si-pan-ya atu Pu-taw-ya, Fa-kuo hitay mialaw tu Ma-te-li katukuh i Li-se-pen, tawyaay a tahudan yada tu namin milaliw taydan i Pa-si, u macimacian mamin tu a mapeci malawpes.caysiwcaysep mihecaan cacay a bataaan bulad tulu demiad, Li-se-pen palekal tu nikalepacawan, belihen ku cun-cu-ce, lima demiad kun-he-tan tademaw itida i Li-se-pen mihapu mapatineng tu ku Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan, Li-se-pen mibuhat tu adidiay nu Ta-si-yeng minatu a tukayan. ayda u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, tatelungan nu lalangawan, satabakiay nu minatuan atu satabakiay nu tukayan. Âú®19‰∏ñÁ¥ÄÂàù, . caysiwpicsip mihcaan Li-se-pen mapalekal ku Kan-nay-si kemin, mapatideng tu ku Pu-taw-ya a lihalayay. caysiwwallu mihcaan, Pei-lun-ta atu Ze-nuo-ni-muo siwtawyen mala kitakit nu nababalakian a lalangawan. caysiwsiwwal mihcaan, sikawaw ku Li-se-pen tu kitakit nu Pu-lan-huy, sapatingakay u " bayu, anu ayaway a zaysang", pasitungus tu Li-se-pen bayuay a tukayan. nipatingakay nu Puo-lan-huy caylutu demiad, pulung han nu tadaay a tademaw makaala tu cacay a malebut ku taydaay miadih. 1974 .
S.PHON: == r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn *** == r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn " kamu nu pu-taw-ja "r~…æisboa(r~…æi* î~ °bo*) , u pu- ¶in, pu-taw-ja-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo a suotu atu satabakiaj nu tukaj, u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kanatar~…æ, mar~…æasiƒßu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatar~…æ a r~…æumaan. kakitidaan itida i pu-taw-ja t…ôban timur~…æan nu ta-si-j…ô≈ã dadipasan, tukaj nu amis u sin-t…ô î~ °-r~…æa buju î~ °, timur~…æan nu tukaj u t…ô î~ °-zu sa î~ °wa ¶ nu tataƒßkar~…æan, atu r~…æun-tun, pa-r~…æi, r~…æuo-ma sakar~…æ…ô ¶ad u si-o sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…æikisian a tukajan. kitidaan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian ***.** pin-fan-kun-r~…æi, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw. pasu wi-sin- ¶…ôn a tukajan nu tad…ômaw mar~…æakuujt tu *** wa≈ã nu tad…ômawan, maƒßida u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw a **%. ajda atu puo-…ô-tu masur~…æ…ô ¶ad u pu-taw-ja nu tusaaj a dajƒßiwan nu tukaj. r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u tukaj atu ¶…ô- ¶ja-s…ô, u kakitidaan nu siƒßu atu r~…æuma î~ ° nu tapan a kanatar~…æ. pu-taw-ja-ji kanatar~…æ kapur~…æu≈ãan nu ƒßunbu itida i nijadu î~ ° nuƒß…ôni, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…æu satipan a suo-tu, itida i ta-si-j…ôn dadipasan. ( ¶pr~…æp) . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u ginku, papa ¶akajan, pasi≈ãbu≈ãaj, nar~…æimaan, kanatar~…æ nu sasiwbajan, ¶jawji atu r~…æar~…æiwkuan a satapa≈ãan, sipakajda i kitakit atu kanatar~…æan nu tukaj nikinkiwan tu wanr~…æu "gaw ¶" a niƒßapuan " kitakit nu tukaj" a ≈ãa≈ãanan, sipasir~…æa ¶ u ar~…æpƒßa- ¶i a kanatar~…æ nu tukaj, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…æu a a≈ãa≈ãan nu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan a sakaudip, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn-kan u o- ¶uo-ta-si-j…ô≈ã dadipasan nu satabakiaj a minatuan. namaƒßida, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn paƒßikukian itida i tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…æ miƒß ¶aaƒß miar~…æa tu tusiws…ôps…ôp nu tajdaaj a tad…ômaw, u pu-taw-ja sanaiaj nu r~…æawadan a paƒßikukiaj, ji-pi-r~…æi-pan-daw sakatur~…æu nu sanaiaj nu r~…æawadan a paƒßikukian atu o- ¶uo tu saka tus…ôp nu sainai î~ °aj nu r~…æawdan a paƒßikukiaj. (gaw ¶) ar~…æpƒßa- . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u na-o saka siwa nu tajdaaj musakamuaj a satabakiaj nu tukajan, mikir~…æur~…æ tu ji-s…ô-tan-paw, r~…æuo-ma, pa-saj-r~…æu≈ã-na, mi-r~…æan, ja-tin, wi-ni-s…ô, ma-t…ô-r~…æi atu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô, tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn nu tajdaaj mida≈ã a tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw. kitidaan nu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a gdp pi ¶akajan mikitar~…æakaw tu pu-taw-ja duma nu nijadu î~ °an. pur~…æu≈ã nu sakasir~…æa ¶ur~…æan *** ji m…ônj…ôn. pur~…æu≈ã nu siwka ¶ saka s…ôpat a bataan. pu-taw-ja miawasaj a kusi a ƒßunbu itida namin i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn nijadu î~ °an. gdp . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn i kitakit u sat…ôn…ôsaj a tukajan, saka tusa nu sumamadaj nu o- ¶uo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu ajdaaj nu o- ¶uo matabar~…æ tu pina a s…ô- ¶i a nikaadiƒßan. pi ¶id…ôkan u u-s…ô. kaj-sa ku pa≈ãa≈ãanaj " f…ôr~…æi ¶itas jur~…æia" imi u " par~…æipaƒßak kaj-sa" kainaian tu nu r~…æuo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka r~…æima a s…ô ¶i r~…æi≈ãatu, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a sir~…æa ¶an z…ô-…ô-man nijadu î~ ° ku mikuwanaj, nikuda sa itida i war~…æu a s…ô ¶ian ƒßijan nu muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbu≈ã, ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ miƒß ¶aan, a-fan-suo is…ô d…ôbu≈ãan kina tukaj, namakajda i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn ƒßida satu u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. "f…ôr~…æi ¶itas *ur~…æia"(**" . r~…æikisi ** namaka sin-s…ô- ¶i zitaj mar~…æi≈ãatu, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a kitidaan idaw tuku ji-pi-r~…æi tad…ômaw tuda mu…ôn…ô≈ã, satabar~…æaj a tajniaj nu tad…ômaw u f…ôi-ni- ¶i tad…ômaw. ju tus…ôpr~…æim miƒß ¶aan u r~…æuo-ma-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo ku mikuwanaj, tajaaj mikuwanaj ¶i kaj-sa pa ¶akat…ôn nida kina kitidaan mar~…æas…ô î~ °, pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan u "f…ôr~…æi ¶itasjur~…æia" imi u " kar~…æipaƒßak kaj-sa", nika makatukuƒß tu kunj…ôn r~…æima a s…ô ¶i kakir~…æukir~…æur~…æ sa d…ôbu≈ãan nu man- ¶u. "f…ôr~…æi ¶itas *ur~…æia" . . kunj…ôn pi ¶ ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, namaka p…ôa-fuj a muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbu≈ã i ji-pi-r~…æi pantaw, mid…ôbu≈ã tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn. par~…æutat…ô≈ãaan tu tapa≈ãan u ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶jaw a muo-…ô tad…ômaw itida i ma ¶i patid…ô≈ã tu jadaƒßaj nu ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô, patid…ô≈ã tu jadaƒßaj nu r~…æumaan atu bar~…æuƒßaj a ¶ab…ô≈ã. pikuwanan nu ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶jaw, ma ¶akat tu ku sakaudip nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, mir~…æa itiniaj u tapa≈ã nu minatuan, imaƒßini, ma ¶ian nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj namin kar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku par~…æutat…ô≈ãaan tu tapa≈ã idaw ku kir~…æis…ôtu, mu-s…ô-r~…æin atu jiw-taj tad…ômaw. ******, . ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ miƒß ¶aan, pu-taw-ja kuowan ¶i a-fun mir~…æir~…æid tu ƒßitaj mi î~ °dis tu muo-…ô- tad…ômaw, u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mutiku a ¶a tu kir~…æis…ôtu. ¶ajtur~…æimn…ôm miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mur~…æa pu-taw-ja a suo-tu, ƒßida satu mapatid…ô≈ã mar~…æa o- ¶uo atu -ti- ¶un-ƒßaj tapa≈ã nu tatajdaan misiwbaj a tukajan. i kitidaan katin…ô≈ãan, katuud ku pa ¶ur~…æir~…æaj tu nu baju a bar~…æu≈ãaan pasu ¶i wa-s…ô-k…ô.d. ¶ja-ma-tu u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…æi≈ãand katukuƒß i kitakit nu ¶aajaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad nu tatajdaan mitaƒßaw, sisa, katukuƒß tu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶i saka ¶…ôr~…æakan ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn tajaw, jadaƒßaj nu kiman itawja namaka pu-taw-ja a mabur~…æawaj nu tad…ômw nu pa-si katukuƒß i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, itini kasi î~ °pu ¶a u kajsi≈ã ku masa≈ãaaj, sisa u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…æa o- ¶uo u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu pa ¶akajaj. *****, . ¶ajr~…æims…ôpn…ôm miƒß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…æad sabaw siwa d…ômiad, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu kawaw tu jiw-taj tad…ômaw a mir~…æitabat, maar~…æa ku **** nu tad…ômawan makaar~…æa tu par~…æas…ôpat…ôn nu ¶a ¶ajaj ku mapatajaj nu jiw-taj a tad…ômawan. ¶ajr~…æimr~…æu ¶aj miƒß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…æad tu…ôn…ôm d…ômiad, idaw ku tabakiaj nu nin…ôr~…æ i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn . ¶ajr~…æimwar~…æs…ôp miƒß ¶aan si-pan-ja ƒßa-pu-s…ô-paw-wan ¶aw mikuwan tu pu-taw-ja wanwi midudu ¶ mar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, u si-pan-ja a ƒßitaj mid…ôbu≈ã tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, si-pan-ja kuowan ¶i fuj-r~…æi-pu …ôs…ô mikutaj mar~…æa pu-taw-ja a kuowan, misakaput u si-pan-ja ti-kuo ku sikawawaj a kun- ¶u-r~…æan-pan ji-pi-r~…æi r~…æ…ônmun, ja r~…æ…ônmun sadikudaj u pu-taw-ja itida i ¶ajn…ômsips…ôp miƒß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd sa mabur~…æ…ôsak. **********, . ¶ajpi ¶r~…æimr~…æim miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu nin…ôr~…æan i o- ¶uo makaar~…æa tu siw a ¶i nu piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj nu nin…ôr~…æ, makatuduƒß atu ¶abijasan nu baju makaar~…æa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu wa≈ã ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, pi ¶id…ôkan i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku siwa a wa≈ãan nu tad…ômaw a mapataj, u tukaj atu minatu ku piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj, pasur~…æi-wi-r~…æa-kun atu si≈ãa≈ãanaj nu tuudan, kiwkaj, aadiƒßan tu ¶udad a r~…æuma î~ ° u r~…æuma î~ ° tu, kanaƒßatu nu ¶aajaj ka r~…æujuƒß nu nin…ôr~…æan ku r~…æumaa î~ ° sadikudaj ¶aaj tu pakaput tu r~…æamar~…æ a nipip…ôs…ô≈ãan, ƒßida satu ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a ¶aaj tu r~…æ…ôkar~…æ, pu-taw-ja kanatar~…æ ƒßida satu mar~…æi≈ãatu a nai î~ ° ku r~…æaƒß…ô ¶i. *****, . nipatid…ô≈ãan tu nadikudan a r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ tu putaƒß, dadan, u kuo-wan atu suo-sin miawda tu katuudaj nu misa≈ãaaj tu r~…æuma î~ ° atu matin…ô≈ãaj mikur~…æitaj patid…ô≈ã tu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ma ¶i, nika ƒßini pabar~…æuƒßaj mikijaku tu tukaj, patid…ô≈ã tu bar~…æuƒßaj a pan-pa-…ô-s…ô nu sa≈ãaan ƒßidan u wajwaj nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° a misa≈ãa tu tar~…æakaw apuju nu sir~…æa ¶an, u r~…æuo-k…ô-k…ô atu sin-ku-t…ôn ¶uji ku sapatumi î~ °, nika sadajum…ôn, par~…æa ¶a ¶aj ƒßan nu ƒßakuna, nipisa≈ãaan tu r~…æumaan ka ¶an pa ¶uk…ôdan tu saka ¶aaj ka tar~…æaw nu nin…ôr~…æan. . sabaw siwa tu r~…æi≈ãatu, ¶i na-puo î~ °-r~…æun jis…ô par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu pantaw kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan midis tu si-pan-ja atu pu-taw-ja, fa-kuo ƒßitaj miar~…æaw tu ma-t…ô-r~…æi katukuƒß i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, tawjaaj a taƒßudan jada tu namin mir~…æar~…æiw tajdan i pa-si, u ma ¶ima ¶ian mamin tu a map…ô ¶i mar~…æawp…ôs. ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp miƒß…ô ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataaan bur~…æad tur~…æu d…ômiad, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, b…ôr~…æiƒß…ôn ku ¶un- ¶u- ¶…ô, r~…æima d…ômiad kun-ƒß…ô-tan tad…ômaw itida i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn miƒßapu mapatin…ô≈ã tu ku pu-taw-ja-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo. sakatusa nu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mibuƒßat tu adidiaj nu ta-si-j…ô≈ã minatu a tukajan. ajda u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, satabakiaj nu minatuan atu satabakiaj nu tukajan. ******, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶sip miƒß ¶aan r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mapar~…æ…ôkar~…æ ku kan-naj-si k…ômin, mapatid…ô≈ã tu ku pu-taw-ja a r~…æiƒßar~…æajaj. ¶ajsiwwar~…ær~…æu miƒß ¶aan, p…ôi-r~…æun-ta atu z…ô-nuo-ni-muo siwtawj…ôn mar~…æa kitakit nu nababar~…æakian a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. ¶ajsiwsiwwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, sikawaw ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn tu kitakit nu pu-r~…æan-ƒßuj, sapati≈ãakaj u " baju, anu ajawaj a zajsa≈ã", pasitu≈ãus tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn bajuaj a tukajan. nipati≈ãakaj nu puo-r~…æan-ƒßuj ¶ajr~…æutu d…ômiad, pur~…æu≈ã ƒßan nu tadaaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…æ…ôbut ku tajdaaj miadiƒß. **** .
S.FORM: == Li-se-pen ÈáåÊñØÊú¨ == Li-se-pen " kamu nu Pu-taw-ya "Lisboa(li í'bo…ê) , u Pu-cin, Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo a suotu atu satabakiay nu tukay, u tatelungan nu cen-ce a kanatal, malasihu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatal a lumaan. kakitidaan itida i Pu-taw-ya teban timulan nu Ta-si-yeng dadipasan, tukay nu amis u Sin-te'-la buyu', timulan nu tukay u Te'-zu sa'wac nu tatahkalan, atu Lun-tun, Pa-li, Luo-ma sakalecad u Si-o satenesay nu likisian a tukayan. kitidaan nu macimacian 100.05 pin-fan-kun-li, tademaw 544,851 ku tademaw. pasu Wi-sin-cen a tukayan nu tademaw malakuuyt tu 300 wang nu tademawan, mahida u Pu-taw-ya tademaw a 27%. ayda atu Puo-e-tu masulecad u Pu-taw-ya nu tusaay a dayhiwan nu tukay. Li-se-pen u tukay atu ce-cya-se, u kakitidaan nu sihu atu luma' nu tapan a kanatal. Pu-taw-ya-yi kanatal kapulungan nu hunbu itida i niyadu' nuheni, u O-cuo-ta-lu satipan a suo-tu, itida i Ta-si-yen dadipasan. (CPLP) . Li-se-pen u ginku, papacakayan, pasingbungay, nalimaan, kanatal nu sasiwbayan, cyawyi atu laliwkuan a satapangan, sipakayda i kitakit atu kanatalan nu tukay nikinkiwan tu wanlu "GaWC" a nihapuan " kitakit nu tukay" a nganganan, sipasilac u ALPHA-ci a kanatal nu tukay, u O-cuo-ta-lu a angangan nu tatelungan a sakaudip, Li-se-pen-kan u O-cuo-ta-si-yeng dadipasan nu satabakiay a minatuan. Namahida, Li-se-pen pahikukian itida i tusepcaywal mihcaah miala tu tusiwsepsep nu taydaay a tademaw, u Pu-taw-ya sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukiay, Yi-pi-li-pan-daw sakatulu nu sanaiay nu lawadan a pahikukian atu O-cuo tu saka tusep nu sainai'ay nu lawdan a pahikukiay. (GaWC) ALPHA- . Li-se-pen u Na-o saka siwa nu taydaay musakamuay a satabakiay nu tukayan, mikilul tu Yi-se-tan-paw, Luo-ma, Pa-say-lung-na, Mi-lan, Ya-tin, Wi-ni-se, Ma-te-li atu Fuo-luo-lun-se, tusepcaywal mihcaan, Li-se-pen nu taydaay midang a tademaw makaala tu 3,539,400 ku tademaw. kitidaan nu Li-se-pen a GDP picakayan mikitalakaw tu Pu-taw-ya duma nu niyadu'an. pulung nu sakasilaculan 963 yi menyen. pulung nu siwkac saka sepat a bataan. Pu-taw-ya miawasay a kusi a hunbu itida namin i Li-se-pen niyadu'an. GDP . Li-se-pen i kitakit u satenesay a tukayan, saka tusa nu sumamaday nu O-cuo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu aydaay nu O-cuo matabal tu pina a se-ci a nikaadihan. picidekan u U-se. Kay-sa ku panganganay " Felicitas julia" imi u " palipahak Kay-sa" kainaian tu nu Luo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka lima a seci lingatu, Li-se-pen a silacan Ze-e-man niyadu' ku mikuwanay, nikuda sa itida i walu a secian hiyan nu Muo-e tademaw midebung, caycaysippic mihcaan, A-fan-suo ise debungan kina tukay, namakayda i Li-se-pen hida satu u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, sakaudip atu tatelungan nu lalangawan. "Felicitas Julia"(ÊÑèÁÇ∫" . likisi Ê≠∑Âè≤ namaka sin-se-ci zitay malingatu, Li-se-pen a kitidaan idaw tuku Yi-pi-li tademaw tuda mueneng, satabalay a tayniay nu tademaw u Fei-ni-ci tademaw. yu tuseplim mihcaan u Luo-ma-kun-he-kuo ku mikuwanay, tayaay mikuwanay ci Kay-sa pacakaten nida kina kitidaan malase', pangangan han u "Felicitasjulia" imi u " kalipahak Kay-sa", nika makatukuh tu kunyen lima a seci kakilukilul sa debungan nu Man-cu. "Felicitas Julia" . . kunyen piccaycay mihcaan, namaka pea-fuy a Muo-e tademaw midebung i Yi-pi-li pantaw, midebung tu Li-se-pen. palutatengaan tu Tapangan u Yi-se-lan-cyaw a Muo-e tademaw itida i maci patideng tu yadahay nu Cin-cen-se, patideng tu yadahay nu lumaan atu baluhay a cabeng. pikuwanan nu Yi-se-lan-cyaw, macakat tu ku sakaudip nu macimacian, mila itiniay u tapang nu minatuan, imahini, macian nu tademaw caay namin kalecad ku palutatengaan tu Tapang idaw ku kilisetu, Mu-se-lin atu Yiw-tay tademaw. ÂÖ¨ÂÖÉ711Âπ¥, . caycaysippic mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya kuowan ci A-fun mililid tu hitay mi'dis tu Muo-e- tademaw, u Li-se-pen mutiku aca tu kilisetu. caytulimnem mihcaan, Li-se-pen mula Pu-taw-ya a suo-tu, hida satu mapatideng mala O-cuo atu -Ti-cun-hay tapang nu tataydaan misiwbay a tukayan. i kitidaan katinengan, katuud ku paculilay tu nu bayu a balungaan pasu ci Wa-se-ke.D.Cya-ma-tu u Li-se-pen malingand katukuh i kitakit nu caayay kalecad nu tataydaan mitahaw, sisa, katukuh tu sabaw tu enem a seci sakacelakan ku Li-se-pen tayaw, yadahay nu kiman itawya namaka Pu-taw-ya a mabulaway nu tademw nu Pa-si katukuh i Li-se-pen, itini kasi'puca u kaysing ku masangaay, sisa u Li-se-pen mala O-cuo u tatelungan nu pacakayay. 1147Âπ¥, . caylimsepnem mihcaan sepat bulad sabaw siwa demiad, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu kawaw tu Yiw-tay tademaw a militabat, maala ku 4000 nu tademawan makaala tu palasepaten nu cacayay ku mapatayay nu Yiw-tay a tademawan. caylimlucay mihcaan cacay bulad tuenem demiad, idaw ku tabakiay nu ninel i Li-se-pen . caylimwalsep mihcaan Si-pan-ya Ha-pu-se-paw-wancaw mikuwan tu Pu-taw-ya wanwi miduduc malepacaw, u Si-pan-ya a hitay midebung tu Li-se-pen, Si-pan-ya kuowan ci Fuy-li-pu ese mikutay mala Pu-taw-ya a kuowan, misakaput u Si-pan-ya ti-kuo ku sikawaway a Kun-cu-lan-pan Yi-pi-li lenmun, ya lenmun sadikuday u Pu-taw-ya itida i caynemsipsep mihcaan misiteked sa mabulesak. 1506Âπ¥4Êúà19Êó•, . caypiclimlim mihcaan, Li-se-pen idaw ku tabakiay nu ninelan i O-cuo makaala tu siw a ci nu pihacengay nu ninel, makatuduh atu cabiyasan nu bayu makaala tu cacay a bataan nu wang ku mapatayay a tademaw, picidekan i Li-se-pen idaw ku siwa a wangan nu tademaw a mapatay, u tukay atu minatu ku pihacengay, pasuLi-wi-la-kun atu singanganay nu tuudan, kiwkay, aadihan tu cudad a luma' u luma' tu, kanahatu nu caayay ka luyuh nu ninelan ku lumaa' sadikuday caay tu pakaput tu lamal a nipipesengan, hida satu ku Li-se-pen a caay tu lekal, Pu-taw-ya kanatal hida satu malingatu a nai' ku laheci. 1755Âπ¥, . nipatidengan tu nadikudan a Li-se-pen, misaahebal tu putah, dadan, u Kuo-wan atu Suo-sin miawda tu katuuday nu misangaay tu luma' atu matinengay mikulitay patideng tu tatelungan nu maci, nika hini pabaluhay mikiyaku tu tukay, patideng tu baluhay a Pan-pa-e-se nu sangaan hidan u wayway nu lala' a misanga tu talakaw apuyu nu silacan, u Luo-ke-ke atu Sin-ku-ten cuyi ku sapatumi', nika sadayumen, palacacay han nu hakuna, nipisangaan tu lumaan kacan pacukedan tu sakacaay ka talaw nu ninelan. . sabaw siwa tu lingatu, ci Na-puo'-lun yise palekal tu pantaw kalepacawan midis tu Si-pan-ya atu Pu-taw-ya, Fa-kuo hitay mialaw tu Ma-te-li katukuh i Li-se-pen, tawyaay a tahudan yada tu namin milaliw taydan i Pa-si, u macimacian mamin tu a mapeci malawpes.caysiwcaysep mihecaan cacay a bataaan bulad tulu demiad, Li-se-pen palekal tu nikalepacawan, belihen ku cun-cu-ce, lima demiad kun-he-tan tademaw itida i Li-se-pen mihapu mapatineng tu ku Pu-taw-ya-kun-he-kuo. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan, Li-se-pen mibuhat tu adidiay nu Ta-si-yeng minatu a tukayan. ayda u Pu-taw-ya a cen-ce, tatelungan nu lalangawan, satabakiay nu minatuan atu satabakiay nu tukayan. Âú®19‰∏ñÁ¥ÄÂàù, . caysiwpicsip mihcaan Li-se-pen mapalekal ku Kan-nay-si kemin, mapatideng tu ku Pu-taw-ya a lihalayay. caysiwwallu mihcaan, Pei-lun-ta atu Ze-nuo-ni-muo siwtawyen mala kitakit nu nababalakian a lalangawan. caysiwsiwwal mihcaan, sikawaw ku Li-se-pen tu kitakit nu Pu-lan-huy, sapatingakay u " bayu, anu ayaway a zaysang", pasitungus tu Li-se-pen bayuay a tukayan. nipatingakay nu Puo-lan-huy caylutu demiad, pulung han nu tadaay a tademaw makaala tu cacay a malebut ku taydaay miadih. 1974 .
S.PHON: == r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn *** == r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn " kamu nu pu-taw-ja "r~…æisboa(r~…æi* î~ °bo*) , u pu- ¶in, pu-taw-ja-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo a suotu atu satabakiaj nu tukaj, u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kanatar~…æ, mar~…æasiƒßu kakitidaan atu tapan nu kanatar~…æ a r~…æumaan. kakitidaan itida i pu-taw-ja t…ôban timur~…æan nu ta-si-j…ô≈ã dadipasan, tukaj nu amis u sin-t…ô î~ °-r~…æa buju î~ °, timur~…æan nu tukaj u t…ô î~ °-zu sa î~ °wa ¶ nu tataƒßkar~…æan, atu r~…æun-tun, pa-r~…æi, r~…æuo-ma sakar~…æ…ô ¶ad u si-o sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…æikisian a tukajan. kitidaan nu ma ¶ima ¶ian ***.** pin-fan-kun-r~…æi, tad…ômaw ***,*** ku tad…ômaw. pasu wi-sin- ¶…ôn a tukajan nu tad…ômaw mar~…æakuujt tu *** wa≈ã nu tad…ômawan, maƒßida u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw a **%. ajda atu puo-…ô-tu masur~…æ…ô ¶ad u pu-taw-ja nu tusaaj a dajƒßiwan nu tukaj. r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u tukaj atu ¶…ô- ¶ja-s…ô, u kakitidaan nu siƒßu atu r~…æuma î~ ° nu tapan a kanatar~…æ. pu-taw-ja-ji kanatar~…æ kapur~…æu≈ãan nu ƒßunbu itida i nijadu î~ ° nuƒß…ôni, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…æu satipan a suo-tu, itida i ta-si-j…ôn dadipasan. ( ¶pr~…æp) . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u ginku, papa ¶akajan, pasi≈ãbu≈ãaj, nar~…æimaan, kanatar~…æ nu sasiwbajan, ¶jawji atu r~…æar~…æiwkuan a satapa≈ãan, sipakajda i kitakit atu kanatar~…æan nu tukaj nikinkiwan tu wanr~…æu "gaw ¶" a niƒßapuan " kitakit nu tukaj" a ≈ãa≈ãanan, sipasir~…æa ¶ u ar~…æpƒßa- ¶i a kanatar~…æ nu tukaj, u o- ¶uo-ta-r~…æu a a≈ãa≈ãan nu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan a sakaudip, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn-kan u o- ¶uo-ta-si-j…ô≈ã dadipasan nu satabakiaj a minatuan. namaƒßida, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn paƒßikukian itida i tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…æ miƒß ¶aaƒß miar~…æa tu tusiws…ôps…ôp nu tajdaaj a tad…ômaw, u pu-taw-ja sanaiaj nu r~…æawadan a paƒßikukiaj, ji-pi-r~…æi-pan-daw sakatur~…æu nu sanaiaj nu r~…æawadan a paƒßikukian atu o- ¶uo tu saka tus…ôp nu sainai î~ °aj nu r~…æawdan a paƒßikukiaj. (gaw ¶) ar~…æpƒßa- . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn u na-o saka siwa nu tajdaaj musakamuaj a satabakiaj nu tukajan, mikir~…æur~…æ tu ji-s…ô-tan-paw, r~…æuo-ma, pa-saj-r~…æu≈ã-na, mi-r~…æan, ja-tin, wi-ni-s…ô, ma-t…ô-r~…æi atu fuo-r~…æuo-r~…æun-s…ô, tus…ôp ¶ajwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn nu tajdaaj mida≈ã a tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu *,***,*** ku tad…ômaw. kitidaan nu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a gdp pi ¶akajan mikitar~…æakaw tu pu-taw-ja duma nu nijadu î~ °an. pur~…æu≈ã nu sakasir~…æa ¶ur~…æan *** ji m…ônj…ôn. pur~…æu≈ã nu siwka ¶ saka s…ôpat a bataan. pu-taw-ja miawasaj a kusi a ƒßunbu itida namin i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn nijadu î~ °an. gdp . r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn i kitakit u sat…ôn…ôsaj a tukajan, saka tusa nu sumamadaj nu o- ¶uo a suo-tu, mikikaka tu ajdaaj nu o- ¶uo matabar~…æ tu pina a s…ô- ¶i a nikaadiƒßan. pi ¶id…ôkan u u-s…ô. kaj-sa ku pa≈ãa≈ãanaj " f…ôr~…æi ¶itas jur~…æia" imi u " par~…æipaƒßak kaj-sa" kainaian tu nu r~…æuo-ma-ti-kuo, namaka r~…æima a s…ô ¶i r~…æi≈ãatu, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a sir~…æa ¶an z…ô-…ô-man nijadu î~ ° ku mikuwanaj, nikuda sa itida i war~…æu a s…ô ¶ian ƒßijan nu muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbu≈ã, ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ miƒß ¶aan, a-fan-suo is…ô d…ôbu≈ãan kina tukaj, namakajda i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn ƒßida satu u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, sakaudip atu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. "f…ôr~…æi ¶itas *ur~…æia"(**" . r~…æikisi ** namaka sin-s…ô- ¶i zitaj mar~…æi≈ãatu, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a kitidaan idaw tuku ji-pi-r~…æi tad…ômaw tuda mu…ôn…ô≈ã, satabar~…æaj a tajniaj nu tad…ômaw u f…ôi-ni- ¶i tad…ômaw. ju tus…ôpr~…æim miƒß ¶aan u r~…æuo-ma-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo ku mikuwanaj, tajaaj mikuwanaj ¶i kaj-sa pa ¶akat…ôn nida kina kitidaan mar~…æas…ô î~ °, pa≈ãa≈ãan ƒßan u "f…ôr~…æi ¶itasjur~…æia" imi u " kar~…æipaƒßak kaj-sa", nika makatukuƒß tu kunj…ôn r~…æima a s…ô ¶i kakir~…æukir~…æur~…æ sa d…ôbu≈ãan nu man- ¶u. "f…ôr~…æi ¶itas *ur~…æia" . . kunj…ôn pi ¶ ¶aj ¶aj miƒß ¶aan, namaka p…ôa-fuj a muo-…ô tad…ômaw mid…ôbu≈ã i ji-pi-r~…æi pantaw, mid…ôbu≈ã tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn. par~…æutat…ô≈ãaan tu tapa≈ãan u ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶jaw a muo-…ô tad…ômaw itida i ma ¶i patid…ô≈ã tu jadaƒßaj nu ¶in- ¶…ôn-s…ô, patid…ô≈ã tu jadaƒßaj nu r~…æumaan atu bar~…æuƒßaj a ¶ab…ô≈ã. pikuwanan nu ji-s…ô-r~…æan- ¶jaw, ma ¶akat tu ku sakaudip nu ma ¶ima ¶ian, mir~…æa itiniaj u tapa≈ã nu minatuan, imaƒßini, ma ¶ian nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj namin kar~…æ…ô ¶ad ku par~…æutat…ô≈ãaan tu tapa≈ã idaw ku kir~…æis…ôtu, mu-s…ô-r~…æin atu jiw-taj tad…ômaw. ******, . ¶aj ¶ajsippi ¶ miƒß ¶aan, pu-taw-ja kuowan ¶i a-fun mir~…æir~…æid tu ƒßitaj mi î~ °dis tu muo-…ô- tad…ômaw, u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mutiku a ¶a tu kir~…æis…ôtu. ¶ajtur~…æimn…ôm miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mur~…æa pu-taw-ja a suo-tu, ƒßida satu mapatid…ô≈ã mar~…æa o- ¶uo atu -ti- ¶un-ƒßaj tapa≈ã nu tatajdaan misiwbaj a tukajan. i kitidaan katin…ô≈ãan, katuud ku pa ¶ur~…æir~…æaj tu nu baju a bar~…æu≈ãaan pasu ¶i wa-s…ô-k…ô.d. ¶ja-ma-tu u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…æi≈ãand katukuƒß i kitakit nu ¶aajaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad nu tatajdaan mitaƒßaw, sisa, katukuƒß tu sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶i saka ¶…ôr~…æakan ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn tajaw, jadaƒßaj nu kiman itawja namaka pu-taw-ja a mabur~…æawaj nu tad…ômw nu pa-si katukuƒß i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, itini kasi î~ °pu ¶a u kajsi≈ã ku masa≈ãaaj, sisa u r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…æa o- ¶uo u tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu pa ¶akajaj. *****, . ¶ajr~…æims…ôpn…ôm miƒß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…æad sabaw siwa d…ômiad, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu kawaw tu jiw-taj tad…ômaw a mir~…æitabat, maar~…æa ku **** nu tad…ômawan makaar~…æa tu par~…æas…ôpat…ôn nu ¶a ¶ajaj ku mapatajaj nu jiw-taj a tad…ômawan. ¶ajr~…æimr~…æu ¶aj miƒß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…æad tu…ôn…ôm d…ômiad, idaw ku tabakiaj nu nin…ôr~…æ i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn . ¶ajr~…æimwar~…æs…ôp miƒß ¶aan si-pan-ja ƒßa-pu-s…ô-paw-wan ¶aw mikuwan tu pu-taw-ja wanwi midudu ¶ mar~…æ…ôpa ¶aw, u si-pan-ja a ƒßitaj mid…ôbu≈ã tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, si-pan-ja kuowan ¶i fuj-r~…æi-pu …ôs…ô mikutaj mar~…æa pu-taw-ja a kuowan, misakaput u si-pan-ja ti-kuo ku sikawawaj a kun- ¶u-r~…æan-pan ji-pi-r~…æi r~…æ…ônmun, ja r~…æ…ônmun sadikudaj u pu-taw-ja itida i ¶ajn…ômsips…ôp miƒß ¶aan misit…ôk…ôd sa mabur~…æ…ôsak. **********, . ¶ajpi ¶r~…æimr~…æim miƒß ¶aan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku tabakiaj nu nin…ôr~…æan i o- ¶uo makaar~…æa tu siw a ¶i nu piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj nu nin…ôr~…æ, makatuduƒß atu ¶abijasan nu baju makaar~…æa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu wa≈ã ku mapatajaj a tad…ômaw, pi ¶id…ôkan i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn idaw ku siwa a wa≈ãan nu tad…ômaw a mapataj, u tukaj atu minatu ku piƒßa ¶…ô≈ãaj, pasur~…æi-wi-r~…æa-kun atu si≈ãa≈ãanaj nu tuudan, kiwkaj, aadiƒßan tu ¶udad a r~…æuma î~ ° u r~…æuma î~ ° tu, kanaƒßatu nu ¶aajaj ka r~…æujuƒß nu nin…ôr~…æan ku r~…æumaa î~ ° sadikudaj ¶aaj tu pakaput tu r~…æamar~…æ a nipip…ôs…ô≈ãan, ƒßida satu ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn a ¶aaj tu r~…æ…ôkar~…æ, pu-taw-ja kanatar~…æ ƒßida satu mar~…æi≈ãatu a nai î~ ° ku r~…æaƒß…ô ¶i. *****, . nipatid…ô≈ãan tu nadikudan a r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, misaaƒß…ôbar~…æ tu putaƒß, dadan, u kuo-wan atu suo-sin miawda tu katuudaj nu misa≈ãaaj tu r~…æuma î~ ° atu matin…ô≈ãaj mikur~…æitaj patid…ô≈ã tu tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu ma ¶i, nika ƒßini pabar~…æuƒßaj mikijaku tu tukaj, patid…ô≈ã tu bar~…æuƒßaj a pan-pa-…ô-s…ô nu sa≈ãaan ƒßidan u wajwaj nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° a misa≈ãa tu tar~…æakaw apuju nu sir~…æa ¶an, u r~…æuo-k…ô-k…ô atu sin-ku-t…ôn ¶uji ku sapatumi î~ °, nika sadajum…ôn, par~…æa ¶a ¶aj ƒßan nu ƒßakuna, nipisa≈ãaan tu r~…æumaan ka ¶an pa ¶uk…ôdan tu saka ¶aaj ka tar~…æaw nu nin…ôr~…æan. . sabaw siwa tu r~…æi≈ãatu, ¶i na-puo î~ °-r~…æun jis…ô par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu pantaw kar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan midis tu si-pan-ja atu pu-taw-ja, fa-kuo ƒßitaj miar~…æaw tu ma-t…ô-r~…æi katukuƒß i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn, tawjaaj a taƒßudan jada tu namin mir~…æar~…æiw tajdan i pa-si, u ma ¶ima ¶ian mamin tu a map…ô ¶i mar~…æawp…ôs. ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp miƒß…ô ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataaan bur~…æad tur~…æu d…ômiad, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, b…ôr~…æiƒß…ôn ku ¶un- ¶u- ¶…ô, r~…æima d…ômiad kun-ƒß…ô-tan tad…ômaw itida i r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn miƒßapu mapatin…ô≈ã tu ku pu-taw-ja-kun-ƒß…ô-kuo. sakatusa nu nikar~…æ…ôpa ¶awan, r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mibuƒßat tu adidiaj nu ta-si-j…ô≈ã minatu a tukajan. ajda u pu-taw-ja a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, tat…ôr~…æu≈ãan nu r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan, satabakiaj nu minatuan atu satabakiaj nu tukajan. ******, . ¶ajsiwpi ¶sip miƒß ¶aan r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn mapar~…æ…ôkar~…æ ku kan-naj-si k…ômin, mapatid…ô≈ã tu ku pu-taw-ja a r~…æiƒßar~…æajaj. ¶ajsiwwar~…ær~…æu miƒß ¶aan, p…ôi-r~…æun-ta atu z…ô-nuo-ni-muo siwtawj…ôn mar~…æa kitakit nu nababar~…æakian a r~…æar~…æa≈ãawan. ¶ajsiwsiwwar~…æ miƒß ¶aan, sikawaw ku r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn tu kitakit nu pu-r~…æan-ƒßuj, sapati≈ãakaj u " baju, anu ajawaj a zajsa≈ã", pasitu≈ãus tu r~…æi-s…ô-p…ôn bajuaj a tukajan. nipati≈ãakaj nu puo-r~…æan-ƒßuj ¶ajr~…æutu d…ômiad, pur~…æu≈ã ƒßan nu tadaaj a tad…ômaw makaar~…æa tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…æ…ôbut ku tajdaaj miadiƒß. **** .
